overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade during sunset. The scene transitions from neon-lit covered walkways with digital billboards to an open waterfront view featuring industrial structures in the water, then returns toward a stairway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with digital advertising and seating

events.description: passing by people seated on white concrete benches along the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered promenade, passing digital billboards and seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking ahead in the same direction
people sitting on white benches along the waterfront railing

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure with integrated lighting covering the promenade
large illuminated digital screen displaying colorful advertisements
modern white benches with people seated facing the waterfront
metal railing separating the walkway from the water below
bright pink neon signage for shops along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered waterfront promenade with a concrete overhead structure. Digital billboards and pink neon signs illuminate the left side while people sit on white benches along the right railing. The camera walks forward past pedestrians, maintaining a steady pace through this sheltered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone with industrial piping approaching open waterfront

events.description: large orange industrial pipe structure becomes prominent on the right side
exiting the covered walkway into the open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade as the covered roof ends and the open waterfront view becomes visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket continuing to walk ahead maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive cylindrical orange industrial pipe running vertically along the building exterior
large vertical digital advertisement showing food imagery with purple border

segments.scene_description: Walking through the latter part of the covered promenade, a massive orange industrial pipe dominates the right side. The overhead cover begins to end as the camera approaches the open waterfront, revealing the sunset sky ahead. Digital billboards continue on the right wall while the left side maintains neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront viewing platform with industrial ruins

events.description: full view of water surface and distant industrial pillars opens up as camera exits covered area
camera turns to face the water directly, observing the sunset view and distant structures

agents.ego_description: reaching the open waterfront platform, pausing to observe the water and distant industrial structures silhouetted against the orange sunset sky

notable_agents.action: person leaning on the waterfront railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: calm dark water reflecting the orange sunset sky
tall cylindrical industrial structures standing in the water against the horizon
large rectangular planters with spiky plants where people are seated
palm trees silhouetted against the sunset sky along the waterfront
bright moon visible in the orange dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide waterfront view with the sunset casting an orange glow across the water. Distant industrial pillars stand in the water against the horizon. The camera moves along the railing, passing people seated on concrete planters, then turns to take in the full view of the water and sky before beginning to turn back toward the covered structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching stairway with red neon lighting

events.description: turning back from the waterfront and re-entering the covered structure
approaching concrete stairs leading upward with red circular neon lights visible

agents.ego_description: turning back from the waterfront view and walking toward a concrete stairway leading up into the building structure

notable_agents.action: people descending the concrete stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward into the building interior
row of red circular neon lights along the left wall near the stairs
concrete overhead structure returning as the camera moves back under cover

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the waterfront view, the camera re-enters the covered walkway and approaches a wide concrete stairway leading upward. Red circular neon lights illuminate the left wall near the stairs, while people can be seen descending from above. The scene transitions from the open sunset view back into the artificially lit urban interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban corridor out toward a glowing sunset waterfront before returning to a sheltered stairway. It begins by moving through a covered promenade where pink neon signs and digital billboards illuminate a concrete walkway lined with white benches and pedestrians. As the camera progresses, a massive orange industrial pipe emerges on the right and the overhead cover recedes, gradually revealing the orange glow of the sunset sky. The scene then opens fully into a wide waterfront vista featuring distant industrial pillars in the water, where the camera pauses to take in the horizon before turning back toward the city. Finally, the view shifts from the natural light of the coast back into the artificial interior of the walkway, approaching a wide concrete stairway accented by red circular neon lights.
